news.summary: Australian referee Shaun Evans says he didn’t intend to communicate 'message, affiliation, game or belief of any kind'.

news.headline: Witnessing joy amid the death: BBC travels to epicentre of Ebola outbreak

news.headline: A year on, six questions still haunt the Air India crash investigation
